The Heritage Collection

Six Pieces. One Legacy.

The House of Rijaal

A name carried into battle.
A faith carried for life.

The Zulfiqar — the double-pointed blade of Hazrat Ali (A.S.) — has stood for thirteen centuries as a symbol of strength, justice, and unshaken conviction. RIJAAL reimagines this legacy in sterling silver, so it travels with you: at work, in prayer, and everywhere strength is required quietly.

Simple. Direct. Personal.

02

Submit Your Details

03

Pay On Delivery

Pay by Cash on Delivery, or in advance via bank transfer, Easypaisa, or JazzCash.

Place Your Order

Complete The Form

Fill in your details below — it will open directly in WhatsApp, addressed to our team, ready to send.

You'll be redirected to WhatsApp with your order pre-filled — just hit send.
